mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM COMMUNITY_POST WHERE STATUS != 'B'

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM COMMUNITY_POST P JOIN MEMBER M ON P.MEMBER_ID = M.MEMBER_ID WHERE P.STATUS != 'B'
AND UPPER(P.TITLE) LIKE '%' || UPPER(#{keyword}) || '%'
AND UPPER(M.NAME) = UPPER(#{keyword})
AND UPPER(P.CONTENT) LIKE '%' || UPPER(#{keyword}) || '%'
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM COMMUNITY_POST WHERE STATUS != 'B' AND CATEGORY = #{category}

SELECT P.POST_ID ,P.MEMBER_ID ,M.NAME AS NAME ,P.TITLE ,P.HAS_FILES ,P.CONTENT ,P.VIEW_COUNT ,P.LIKE_COUNT ,(SELECT COUNT(*) FROM COMMUNITY_REPLY WHERE POST_ID = P.POST_ID) COMMENT_COUNT ,P.UPDATED_AT ,P.CATEGORY FROM COMMUNITY_POST P JOIN MEMBER M ON P.MEMBER_ID = M.MEMBER_ID WHERE P.STATUS != 'B' ORDER BY P.UPDATED_AT DESC

SELECT P.POST_ID ,M.NAME AS NAME ,P.TITLE ,P.HAS_FILES ,P.CONTENT ,P.VIEW_COUNT ,P.LIKE_COUNT ,(SELECT COUNT(*) FROM COMMUNITY_REPLY WHERE POST_ID = P.POST_ID) COMMENT_COUNT ,P.UPDATED_AT ,P.CATEGORY FROM COMMUNITY_POST P JOIN MEMBER M ON P.MEMBER_ID = M.MEMBER_ID WHERE P.STATUS != 'B'
AND UPPER(P.TITLE) LIKE '%' || UPPER(#{keyword}) || '%'
AND UPPER(M.NAME) = UPPER(#{keyword})
AND UPPER(P.CONTENT) LIKE '%' || UPPER(#{keyword}) || '%'
ORDER BY P.UPDATED_AT DESC

SELECT P.POST_ID ,M.NAME AS NAME ,P.TITLE ,P.HAS_FILES ,P.CONTENT ,P.VIEW_COUNT ,P.LIKE_COUNT ,(SELECT COUNT(*) FROM COMMUNITY_REPLY WHERE POST_ID = P.POST_ID) COMMENT_COUNT ,P.UPDATED_AT ,P.CATEGORY FROM COMMUNITY_POST P JOIN MEMBER M ON P.MEMBER_ID = M.MEMBER_ID WHERE P.CATEGORY = #{category} AND P.STATUS != 'B' ORDER BY P.UPDATED_AT DESC

SELECT P.POST_ID ,P.MEMBER_ID ,M.NAME AS NAME ,P.TITLE ,P.CONTENT ,P.VIEW_COUNT ,P.LIKE_COUNT ,P.COMMENT_COUNT ,P.UPDATED_AT ,P.CATEGORY ,P.ORIGIN_NAME ,P.CHANGE_NAME ,P.STATUS FROM COMMUNITY_POST P JOIN MEMBER M ON P.MEMBER_ID = M.MEMBER_ID WHERE P.POST_ID = #{postId}
mapper.update: UPDATE COMMUNITY_POST SET TITLE = #{title}, CONTENT = #{content}, CATEGORY = #{category}, UPDATED_AT = SYSDATE WHERE POST_ID = #{postId} AND MEMBER_ID = #{memberId}
mapper.select:
SELECT FILES_ID, POST_ID, MEMBER_ID, URL, ORIGIN_NAME, CHANGE_NAME, TYPE, FILE_SIZE, CREATED_AT FROM POST_FILES WHERE POST_ID = #{postId} AND FILES_ID IN
#{id}
mapper.update: UPDATE COMMUNITY_POST SET HAS_FILES = #{hasFiles}, UPDATED_AT = SYSDATE WHERE POST_ID = #{postId}
mapper.select: SELECT FILES_ID ,POST_ID ,MEMBER_ID ,URL ,ORIGIN_NAME ,CHANGE_NAME ,TYPE ,FILE_SIZE ,CREATED_AT FROM POST_FILES WHERE POST_ID = #{postId} ORDER BY FILES_ID ASC

SELECT R.REPLY_ID ,R.POST_ID ,R.MEMBER_ID ,M.NAME AS NAME ,CASE WHEN R.STATUS = 'N' THEN TO_CLOB('삭제된 댓글입니다.') WHEN R.STATUS = 'B' THEN TO_CLOB('신고된 댓글입니다.') ELSE R.CONTENT END AS CONTENT ,R.LIKE_COUNT ,R.PARENT_REPLY_ID ,R.GROUP_ID ,R.DEPTH ,R.UPDATED_AT ,R.STATUS FROM COMMUNITY_REPLY R JOIN MEMBER M ON R.MEMBER_ID = M.MEMBER_ID WHERE R.POST_ID = #{postId} ORDER BY R.GROUP_ID ASC, R.REPLY_ID ASC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO COMMUNITY_POST_LIKES ( PL_ID ,POST_ID ,MEMBER_ID ,CREATED_AT ,STATUS ) VALUES ( PL_ID_SEQ.NEXTVAL ,#{postId} ,#{memberId} ,SYSDATE ,'Y' )
